# MCP Conformance Test - Server Command Example
# This test demonstrates how to use the server command provided to mcpscripttest

# Define a helper command that will start the server using the provided command
server_command = $MCP_SERVER_COMMAND

# Simple stdio test
[stdio] exec $server_command
[stdio] cmp stderr "server listening" # Or any expected output from your server

# Initialize stdio connection
[stdio] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"TestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
[stdio] exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
[stdio] stdout '"result":'

[stdio] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
[stdio] exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Echo test over stdio
[stdio] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"echo","params":{"message":"test message"}}
[stdio] exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
[stdio] stdout '"result":'
[stdio] stdout '"test message"'

# HTTP test (only runs if HTTP transport detected)
[http] exec $server_command --http=localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT
[http] cmp stderr "HTTP server listening"

# Initialize HTTP connection
[http] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"TestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
[http] exec cat | mcp-send --http=http://localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT
[http] stdout '"result":'

[http] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
[http] exec cat | mcp-send --http=http://localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT

# Echo test over HTTP
[http] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"echo","params":{"message":"http test"}}
[http] exec cat | mcp-send --http=http://localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT
[http] stdout '"result":'
[http] stdout '"http test"'

# SSE test (only runs if SSE transport detected)
[sse] [http] exec $server_command --http=localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT --sse
[sse] [http] cmp stderr "SSE enabled"

# Initialize SSE connection
[sse] [http] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"TestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
[sse] [http] exec cat | mcp-send --http=http://localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT
[sse] [http] stdout '"result":'

[sse] [http] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
[sse] [http] exec cat | mcp-send --http=http://localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT

# Open an SSE stream
[sse] [http] exec mcp-send --http=http://localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT --sse-listen &

# Echo test with progress (should see progress notifications via SSE)
[sse] [http] setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"method":"progress_echo","params":{"message":"sse test","progress_updates":3}}
[sse] [http] exec cat | mcp-send --http=http://localhost:$MCP_HTTP_PORT
[sse] [http] stdout 'event: message'
[sse] [http] stdout 'data: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/progress"'
